description: 企业AI候选信源与原项目现有信源覆盖对照

mappings.name: OpenAI News
mappings.recommended_next_action: Do not add a second enterprise-specific fetcher before source overlap review; reuse existing official_ai output or add enterprise-only filtering downstream.
mappings.notes: Original project already has OpenAI News as a built-in official RSS source and also lists it in the public OPML example.

mappings.name: Anthropic Newsroom
mappings.recommended_next_action: Reuse the existing Anthropic page adapter for first pass; only adjust enterprise classification after source overlap review.
mappings.notes: Existing adapter parses Anthropic newsroom links directly from the same URL as the candidate.

mappings.name: Google Cloud AI & Machine Learning Blog
mappings.recommended_next_action: Verify whether the Google Cloud AI & Machine Learning Blog has a stable official feed or needs a focused page adapter; avoid merging it with DeepMind or Google AI Blog by default.
mappings.notes: Original project covers Google AI and DeepMind, but not the Cloud AI & Machine Learning product blog URL requested by the enterprise inventory.

mappings.name: Microsoft 365 Copilot Release Notes
mappings.recommended_next_action: Treat release notes as a separate enterprise source; verify a stable Microsoft Learn update mechanism without guessing feed URLs.
mappings.notes: Existing public OPML example includes broad Microsoft AI Blog, not Microsoft 365 Copilot release notes.

mappings.name: Azure AI Foundry Blog
mappings.recommended_next_action: Verify whether the TechCommunity category exposes a stable official feed before adding it through OPML or a dedicated adapter.
mappings.notes: No existing Azure AI Foundry source was found in built-in tasks; the project has OPML ingestion and private OPML workflow support.

mappings.name: DeepSeek API News
mappings.existing_source_name: Hacker News Algolia keyword search; AI relevance keywords
mappings.recommended_next_action: Verify the DeepSeek API News page structure and add a focused official-source adapter only if it is stable.
mappings.notes: Original project tracks DeepSeek as a keyword in discussion/relevance paths, but it has no dedicated official DeepSeek API source.

mappings.name: 阿里云百炼 Model Studio
mappings.existing_source_name: Public static page custom fetcher pattern
mappings.recommended_next_action: Verify whether Alibaba Cloud has a changelog, announcement feed, or stable product update page before implementing a custom adapter.
mappings.notes: Required keyword scan found no existing Alibaba/Model Studio source in current fetchers; only generic static/custom fetcher capability exists.

mappings.name: 腾讯云智能体开发平台 ADP
mappings.existing_source_name: Public static page custom fetcher pattern
mappings.recommended_next_action: Verify Tencent Cloud ADP update surfaces and decide between a product-page monitor and a broader Tencent Cloud AI announcement source.
mappings.notes: Required keyword scan found no dedicated Tencent Cloud ADP source; existing project supports custom public page adapters.

mappings.name: 火山引擎方舟 Ark
mappings.existing_source_name: Public static page custom fetcher pattern
mappings.recommended_next_action: Verify whether Volcengine Ark exposes official release notes or case posts; avoid scraping a purely marketing product page if no timestamps exist.
mappings.notes: Required keyword scan found no existing Volcengine or Ark source in current fetchers.

mappings.name: 华为云 AgentArts
mappings.existing_source_name: Public static page custom fetcher pattern
mappings.recommended_next_action: Verify whether AgentArts has product news, documentation updates, or customer cases with timestamps before any adapter work.
mappings.notes: Required keyword scan found no existing Huawei AgentArts source; generic static/custom adapter pattern is available.

mappings.name: Workday AI
mappings.recommended_next_action: Verify whether Workday AI has a stable feed or category feed; if yes, add via private OPML first for watchlist validation.
mappings.notes: Required keyword scan found no current Workday source; project OPML adapter can ingest verified RSS/Atom feeds.

mappings.name: ServiceNow AI
mappings.recommended_next_action: Verify ServiceNow AI blog feed availability and scope before OPML watchlist testing.
mappings.notes: Required keyword scan found no existing ServiceNow source; OPML path is available after feed verification.

mappings.name: Salesforce Blog / Agentforce
mappings.recommended_next_action: Verify whether Salesforce provides a focused Agentforce or AI feed; otherwise plan keyword filtering before broad blog ingestion.
mappings.notes: Required keyword scan found no current Salesforce source; OPML capability exists but broad blog scope may be noisy.

mappings.name: HubSpot AI
mappings.existing_source_name: Public static page custom fetcher pattern
mappings.recommended_next_action: Verify whether HubSpot AI is a static product page or has linked dated updates; prefer a dated source over product-page scraping.
mappings.notes: Required keyword scan found no existing HubSpot source; the candidate URL is a theme/product page rather than a verified feed.

mappings.name: Zendesk AI Blog
mappings.recommended_next_action: Verify Zendesk AI category feed availability and test noise level before enabling any production source.
mappings.notes: Required keyword scan found no current Zendesk source; OPML path can handle a verified feed.

mappings.name: Intercom AI & ML
mappings.recommended_next_action: Verify Intercom AI & ML feed or dated archive before OPML watchlist testing.
mappings.notes: Required keyword scan found no current Intercom source; OPML adapter exists for verified feeds.

mappings.name: Glean Blog
mappings.recommended_next_action: Verify Glean blog feed availability and whether enterprise search/Agent posts can be filtered cleanly.
mappings.notes: Required keyword scan found no existing Glean source; OPML adapter can ingest a verified feed.

mappings.name: Atlassian AI / Rovo
mappings.recommended_next_action: Verify Atlassian AI/Rovo update feed or stable category page; watch for broad collaboration-topic noise.
mappings.notes: Required keyword scan found no current Atlassian source; OPML path can be used after feed verification.

mappings.name: McKinsey State of AI
mappings.recommended_next_action: Handle as 30-day report/manual review source first; do not add production fetcher until update cadence and rights are verified.
mappings.notes: Required keyword scan found no current McKinsey source; the enterprise source plan classifies reports and whitepapers as 30-day or manual/deep-research material.

mappings.name: Deloitte State of AI in the Enterprise
mappings.recommended_next_action: Handle as 30-day report/manual review source first; verify public access and update cadence before automation.
mappings.notes: Required keyword scan found no current Deloitte source; this is better treated as low-frequency research rather than a 24-hour feed.

mappings.name: 中国信通院专题报告
mappings.recommended_next_action: Treat as 30-day official report source; verify whether pages expose dated report listings before considering a custom adapter.
mappings.notes: Required keyword scan found no current CAICT source; PDF/report handling should stay manual or semi-automated until verified.

mappings.name: InfoQ AI
mappings.recommended_next_action: Run source overlap check before adding InfoQ AI topic separately; broad InfoQ feed may already include overlapping items.
mappings.notes: Original project has broad InfoQ CN feed in demo OPML and an RSS replacement rule, but not the requested /topic/AI page.

mappings.name: NIST AI Risk Management Framework
mappings.recommended_next_action: Keep as governance reference/manual review source until a dated updates page or feed is verified.
mappings.notes: Required keyword scan found no current NIST source; low-frequency governance framework content fits manual or 30-day review.

mappings.name: OWASP GenAI Security Project
mappings.existing_source_name: Public static page custom fetcher pattern
mappings.recommended_next_action: Verify whether OWASP GenAI publishes dated project updates, releases, or feeds before adding a security-governance adapter.
mappings.notes: Required keyword scan found no current OWASP source; existing static/custom adapter pattern could support a verified public update surface.
